name: statewave
desc: Open-source memory runtime for AI agents — reproducible, provenance-tagged context bundles instead of query-time retrieval. Apache-2.0, self-hosted on Postgres…
descFull: Open-source memory runtime for AI agents — reproducible, provenance-tagged context bundles instead of query-time retrieval. Apache-2.0, self-hosted on Postgres + pgvector, Python + TypeScript SDKs.
